summary: Branding polish verified: title, favicon, SVG brand mark, new admin email (admin@temuproperti.com) all working. Old admin@speedhome.com correctly rejected. No SPEEDHOME remnants on login/dashboard UI. All sidebar-related authed endpoints return 200.
passed: Browser tab title = 'Temu Properti — Market Intelligence'
favicon.svg served at /favicon.svg with content-type image/svg+xml (HTTP 200)
Login page renders SVG brand-mark + 'TEMU PROPERTI' text (no SPEEDHOME text)
Login email input prefills with admin@temuproperti.com
UI login flow succeeds; dashboard loads with sidebar showing TEMU PROPERTI brand + logo mark + 'admin@temuproperti.com' in user section
All sidebar nav links visible: Dashboard, Search, Saved Analysis, Compare Areas, ROI Calculator, Export History, Settings
Authed endpoints OK with new admin cookie: /api/saved, /api/search/history, /api/export/history/list, /api/areas/all (all HTTP 200)
notes: Test script's wait_for_url('**/dashboard**') was a false alarm — login redirects to '/' (Dashboard route is the root), not '/dashboard'. Verified via screenshot that login actually succeeded and dashboard rendered correctly. Register page not directly tested via UI but Register link is visible on login page; backend register endpoint already validated in prior iterations.
